description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a glossy top, sandwiching two thick beef patties. Between the patties and bun are layers of bright green lettuce, vibrant red tomato slices, and several slices of yellow American cheese, all stacked in a visually appealing manner. The cheese is slightly melted, draping over the edges of the patties, while the lettuce and tomato add a fresh, crisp contrast. The hamburger is presented on a clean white plate, which sits atop a dark wooden surface, enhancing its visual appeal. The top bun is sprinkled with sesame seeds, adding texture and authenticity. The overall construction is tall and neatly layered, with each ingredient clearly visible and evenly distributed.
description: A double-patty hamburger with lettuce, tomato, and cheese, stacked between a glossy sesame seed bun and served on a white plate. The ingredients are fresh, colorful, and neatly layered.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger's stacked layers of lettuce, tomato, cheese, and two beef patties, with the sesame seed bun clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the generous amount of lettuce and tomato, with cheese slices peeking out from both sides and the patties prominently displayed.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the thickness of the patties and the even layering of cheese, lettuce, and tomato beneath the bun.
description_view_3: This angle shows a balanced distribution of toppings and the glossy, sesame-topped bun, with all main ingredients visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly above the bottom bun, followed by tomato slices and cheese, with another layer of cheese between the two beef patties. The toppings are evenly distributed and visible from all sides.
